ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date the patient was admitted */,
  "address" TEXT /* Patient's address for contact information */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Patient's contact number for communication */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the emergency contact */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Any relevant medical history */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Known allergies */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vital_signs" (
  "vital_sign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vital sign record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature reading */,
  "respiration_rate" INTEGER /* Respiration rate */,
  "time_recorded" TEXT /* Time when the vital signs were recorded */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate of the patient */,
  "blood_pressure_systolic" INTEGER /* Systolic blood pressure */,
  "blood_pressure_diastolic" INTEGER /* Diastolic blood pressure */,
  "oxygen_saturation" INTEGER /* Oxygen saturation level */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical staff who recorded the vital signs */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vital_sign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vital_signs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vital_signs_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES medical_staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_results" (
  "lab_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab result */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "smear_result" INTEGER /* Result of the smear test */,
  "infiltration_level" INTEGER /* Level of infiltration */,
  "index_level" INTEGER /* Index level */,
  "blast_cell_count" REAL /* Count of blast cells */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the lab results were recorded */,
  "white_blood_cell_count" REAL /* Count of white blood cells */,
  "red_blood_cell_count" REAL /* Count of red blood cells */,
  "hemoglobin_level" REAL /* Hemoglobin level */,
  "platelet_count" REAL /* Platelet count */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical staff who recorded the lab results */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_results_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_results_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES medical_staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_plans" (
  "treatment_plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment plan */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment plan */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment plan */,
  "plan_details" TEXT /* Details of the treatment plan */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical staff who created the treatment plan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the treatment plan (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES medical_staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_plans_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatment_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment response */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "treatment_plan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment plan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the treatment response (e.g., improved, stable, worsened) */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the response was recorded */,
  "response_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the treatment response */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical staff who recorded the response */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or observations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_responses_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_responses_treatment_plan_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_plan_id") REFERENCES treatment_plans ("treatment_plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatment_responses_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES medical_staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical staff member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the medical staff */,
  "qualification" TEXT /* Qualification of the medical staff */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the medical staff */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the medical staff */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)
column_names: Contact number of the emergency contact
Unique identifier for each vital sign record
Time when the vital signs were recorded
ID of the medical staff who recorded the vital signs
Unique identifier for each lab result
Date when the lab results were recorded
ID of the medical staff who recorded the lab results

End date of the treatment plan
ID of the medical staff who created the treatment plan
Current status of the treatment plan (e.g., ongoing, completed)

ID of the medical staff who recorded the response
